channel.title: Daily AI Digest
channel.description: Curated AI/ML signals — zero LLMs, pure algorithmic curation

item.title: Cosmos 3: Omnimodal World Models for Physical AI
item.description: Cosmos 3: Omnimodal World Models for Physical AI

item.title: AutoLab: Can Frontier Models Solve Long-Horizon Auto Research and Engineering Tasks?
item.description: 📄 New in cs.AI, cs.LG — Scientific and engineering progress is fundamentally a long-horizon iterative process: proposing changes, running experiments, measuring outcomes, and continuously refining artifacts. Yet existing benchmarks for frontier models primarily evaluate either single-turn responses or short-horizon agen...

item.title: Streaming Communication in Multi-Agent Reasoning
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CL, cs.AI — Multi-agent reasoning systems adopt a "generate-then-transfer" paradigm that forces end-to-end latency to scale linearly with pipeline depth. We introduce StreamMA, a multi-agent reasoning system that streams each reasoning step to downstream agents as soon as it is generated, pipelining adjacent...

item.title: STRIDE: Training Data Attribution via Sparse Recovery from Subset Perturbations
item.description: 📄 New in cs.LG, cs.CL — Training Data Attribution (TDA) seeks to trace a model's predictions back to its training data. The gold standard for TDA relies on causal interventions, observing how a model changes when data is added or removed, but repeated retraining is computationally challenging for Large Language Models (...

item.title: Deep Embedded Multiplicative DMD for Algebra-Preserving Koopman Learning
item.description: 📄 New in cs.LG — Koopman theory turns nonlinear dynamics into a linear spectral problem. In computation, however, everything depends on a hard finite-dimensional choice: the observables must be expressive, nearly invariant under the dynamics, and, ideally, compatible with composition. Deep Koopman methods learn f...

item.title: Audio Interaction Model
item.description: 📄 New in cs.SD, cs.AI — Audio is an inherently interactive modality, yet today's Large Audio Language Models (LALMs) are offline, and streaming audio models each handle only a single task such as streaming ASR or voice chatting. It is time to unify them into one online LALM: a model that, through an always-on perceive-d...

item.title: Reinforcement Learning from Rich Feedback with Distributional DAgger
item.description: 📄 New in cs.LG, cs.AI — Reasoning models have advanced rapidly, but the dominant reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) recipe remains surprisingly narrow: sample many responses and reward each with a single bit indicating whether the final answer is correct. Yet many settings provide rich feedback, inclu...

item.title: An Open-Source Two-Stage Computer Vision Pipeline for Fine-Grained Vehicle Classification using Vision Transformers
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV, cs.LG — Vehicle body type is a significant determinant of cyclist injury severity in overtaking crashes, yet automated tools for classifying vehicles into injury-risk-relevant categories from naturalistic roadway video do not exist in the open literature. Standard object detection benchmarks provide only...

item.title: NousResearch / hermes-agent
item.description: ⭐ 1.7k GitHub stars today · ⭐ 180.1k total stars — The agent that grows with you

item.title: chopratejas / headroom
item.description: ⭐ 3.5k GitHub stars today · ⭐ 11.3k total stars — Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

item.title: PaddlePaddle / PaddleOCR
item.description: ⭐ 105 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 79.5k total stars — Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.

item.title: A Beginner's Guide to Making Money Online Easily
